apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: PandaDoc API key from Settings > API & Integrations. Sent as 'Authorization: API-Key <key>'.

restBase.title: REST Base URI
restBase.description: PandaDoc public REST base. Defaults to https://api.pandadoc.com/public/v1.

connectHmacKey.title: Webhook Shared Key
connectHmacKey.description: Optional shared key for verifying inbound webhook HMAC (configured per PandaDoc webhook subscription). Required only if you enable inbound status webhooks; inbound webhooks are rejected unless their signature verifies against this key.
